verdict: A mostly solid Easy chart let down by awkward, rapid vertical eighth-note transitions that disrupt the natural foot flow for beginners.

issues.problem: Rapid eighth-note transition from Up to Down (34.390 to 34.628) is uncomfortable for an Easy chart, forcing an awkward double-step or hip twist.
Eighth-note Up to Down transition creates a rapid vertical movement that is too fast and demanding for beginner players.
Repeated use of the rapid Up to Down vertical transition (238ms) which repeatedly disrupts the player's physical flow.
The chart ends abruptly on an awkward, sudden Up-to-Down eighth note pair instead of a satisfying final beat.
